underlying_goal: Get situational awareness of project progress, audit pre-execution plans for quality and gaps, and pause work cleanly with a comprehensive handoff
friction_detail: Claude initially missed that signals existed elsewhere, used only Opus when user expected GPT delegation via Codex CLI, and misread async task notifications as completed when agents were still running
brief_summary: User wanted to audit Phase 1 plans before execution and pause cleanly; Claude ran parallel Opus+GPT audit lanes, fixed a Codex sandbox bug, logged signals, and produced a 660-line handoff, with some friction around tooling assumptions and async task tracking.
